identity: Stern human male witch hunter, clean-shaven, sharp severe face, short dark hair mostly hidden under a hat, cold pale-blue eyes, pale skin, lean upright build.
outfit: Long black leather trench coat with silver buckles and silver cross-sigils, wide-brimmed puritanical black hat, dark trousers, tall black boots. White high-collar shirt beneath. Bandolier of silver bullets across the chest.
weapons: A flintlock pistol in the right hand, a curved silver saber at the left hip partially drawn.
attackStyle: East-facing. Flintlock pistol raised and fired forward, a puff of smoke and a bright flash at the muzzle. Left hand steadying.
spellStyle: East-facing. Pistol lowered, left hand raised holding a small silver cross that emits a pale-white holy light.
blockStyle: East-facing. Pistol held crosswise in front, wide-brim hat tilted forward, coat pulled up as partial cover.
koStyle: East-facing, fallen on his back, pistol fallen beside him, hat dropped nearby. Coat splayed.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), stern menacing idle. Flintlock pistol held down at his side, free hand on the saber hilt. Wide-brim hat shadowing the eyes.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Wide-brim black hat, cold pale-blue eyes, black leather trench with silver cross-sigils, bandolier visible.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Stern human male witch hunter, clean-shaven, sharp severe face, short dark hair mostly hidden under a hat, cold pale-blue eyes, pale skin, lean upright build.

OUTFIT: Long black leather trench coat with silver buckles and silver cross-sigils, wide-brimmed puritanical black hat, dark trousers, tall black boots. White high-collar shirt beneath. Bandolier of silver bullets across the chest.

WEAPONS: A flintlock pistol in the right hand, a curved silver saber at the left hip partially drawn.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Stern human male witch hunter, clean-shaven, sharp severe face, short dark hair mostly hidden under a hat, cold pale-blue eyes, pale skin, lean upright build.

OUTFIT: Long black leather trench coat with silver buckles and silver cross-sigils, wide-brimmed puritanical black hat, dark trousers, tall black boots. White high-collar shirt beneath. Bandolier of silver bullets across the chest.

WEAPONS: A flintlock pistol in the right hand, a curved silver saber at the left hip partially drawn.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Wide-brim black hat, cold pale-blue eyes, black leather trench with silver cross-sigils, bandolier visible.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
